x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces the NYC Public Advocate's scattered output (Worst Landlord Watchlist, sponsored legislation, reports, public interest requests) as documented tools and adds file_complaint — the net-new write workflow that today exists only as a web form, phone call, or email to the office.

server.name: io.nyc.pubadvocate
server.title: NYC Public Advocate
server.description: Agent-native access to the New York City Public Advocate — the Worst Landlord Watchlist (ranked landlords and their buildings), legislation sponsored by the office, reports and investigations, and public interest demands to city agencies, plus the net-new ability to file and track an ombudsman complaint (help with a city agency) that today exists only as a web form, phone call, or email.
server.instructions: Use find_worst_landlords / get_worst_landlord (and get_worst_landlord_buildings) to explore the Worst Landlord Watchlist by rank or organization/officer name and drill into a landlord's buildings; find_watchlist_buildings searches buildings directly by borough, BIN, BBL, or ZIP. find_legislation covers bills the Public Advocate sponsors (sourced from the Council's Legistar). find_reports returns the office's reports, investigations, and agency report cards; find_public_interest_requests returns oversight demands to agencies. file_complaint (net-new) creates an ombudsman 'help with a city agency' case; it requires an authenticated resident and mutates state — confirm the agency, category, and description with the user, and set consentToContactAgency before submitting so the office may contact the agency on their behalf. Note: the Public Advocate publishes no NYC Open Data, so these tools stand in for surfaces that are today undocumented, PDF-bound, or intake-only.

tools.name: find_worst_landlords
tools.title: Find Worst Landlords
tools.description: Search the NYC Public Advocate's Worst Landlord Watchlist by organization/officer name or rank range.

tools.name: get_worst_landlord
tools.title: Get Worst Landlord
tools.description: Fetch a single landlord from the Worst Landlord Watchlist (portfolio size, units, violations, evictions, rank) by landlord id.

tools.name: get_worst_landlord_buildings
tools.title: Get Worst Landlord Buildings
tools.description: List the buildings in a Watchlist landlord's portfolio, with open HPD/DOB violations.

tools.name: find_watchlist_buildings
tools.title: Find Watchlist Buildings
tools.description: Search Worst Landlord Watchlist buildings by borough, BIN, BBL, ZIP, or free text.

tools.name: find_legislation
tools.title: Find Legislation
tools.description: List legislation the Public Advocate sponsors (Intro #, title, status, committee) — sourced from the City Council's Legistar system.

tools.name: find_reports
tools.title: Find Reports
tools.description: List Public Advocate reports, investigations, and agency report cards by topic, agency, or date.

tools.name: find_public_interest_requests
tools.title: Find Public Interest Requests
tools.description: List public interest demands the Public Advocate has issued to city agencies, and their status.

tools.name: list_my_complaints
tools.title: List My Complaints
tools.description: List the authenticated resident's own ombudsman 'help with a city agency' complaints and their status — today untrackable by machine.

tools.name: file_complaint
tools.title: File a Complaint
tools.description: File an ombudsman complaint asking the NYC Public Advocate for help with a city agency. NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only as a web form, phone call, or email to the office. Requires an authenticated resident. Mutates state — confirm the agency, category, and description first, and set consentToContactAgency=true so the office may contact the agency on the resident's behalf.

tools.name: get_complaint
tools.title: Get Complaint
tools.description: Get the status and detail of one ombudsman complaint by case number.
